title: Amtech C1300 130mm (5") Locking Grip plier
features: DURABLE: This 130mm (5") locking grip plier is nickel plated with curved, serrated steel jaws for a better grip
EASY TO USE: It features a self-locking mechanism and quick-release lever for ease of use
SIZE CAPACITY: 130mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Am-Tech 5-inch locking grip pliers. Made of nickel plated. Curved jaws with serrated grooves for better grip. Quick release lever. Display packed.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Plier See more
